summary: Completed comprehensive UI testing of the major layout redesign. All features working correctly: 3-column grid layout, page tabs (Active/Seeding-Offline), filter tabs (All/Crypto/Exchanges), sidebar with W/L panel, Kitty ($200), Open Positions, and Controls. BUY/SELL buttons functional, sparklines rendering with real Yahoo Finance data, stats row showing all 6 metrics.
passed_tests: Page tabs: Active tab shows 24 crypto engines (running, not seeding, 24/7 markets)
Page tabs: Seeding/Offline tab shows 24 index engines (closed markets on weekend)
Filter tabs: 'All' shows all engines in current page
Filter tabs: 'Crypto' filters to type=coin only (24 on Active, 0 on Offline)
Filter tabs: 'Exchanges' filters to type=market only (0 on Active, 24 on Offline)
No Start/Stop/Reset buttons in header (removed as requested)
Engine cards display in responsive 3-column grid on large screens
Open positions panel in right sidebar (not dominating middle of page)
BUY/SELL buttons visible on active running non-seeding engine cards
BUY button click creates position - verified with BTC trade
Position appears in sidebar Open Positions panel after trade
Sparkline charts render on each card (23 sparklines with real data)
Stats row on each card: State, PF, WR, Acc 30m, Trades, P&L - all 6 columns present
Sidebar shows W/L panel with win/loss count and win rate
Sidebar shows Kitty panel with $200.00 balance
Sidebar shows Controls panel with Trade Size, Stop Loss, Trailing Stop buttons
Controls buttons functional - position size, stop loss, trailing stop all clickable
WebSocket connection active (46 LIVE shown in header)
Auto-start: engines auto-started on first load
Weekend behavior: Active page shows only 24 crypto, Exchanges filter shows 0
seed_data_creation: None - system uses real Yahoo Finance prices
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI layout redesign fully tested and working. Page tabs (Active/Seeding-Offline) correctly filter engines based on status and market hours. Filter tabs (All/Crypto/Exchanges) work within each page. Scalpers (2 engines) are intentionally filtered out from both pages per code design. On weekend: Active=24 crypto, Offline=24 indices. Sidebar contains W/L panel, Kitty ($200), Open Positions, and Controls. BUY/SELL buttons create positions that appear in sidebar. All 50 engines have acc_30m field, 48 have sparkline data.

page_tabs.active_tab: Shows 24 crypto engines (running, not seeding, market_open=true)

filter_tabs.all_filter: Shows all engines in current page

buy_sell_buttons.description: Visible on running non-seeding engines, creates positions on click

sparklines.description: SVG sparklines with real Yahoo Finance data
